suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDT #77 with explicit revisit 'next Monday' (today). Decision needed on whether to include transaction base cost breakdown in bal-devnet-4 before April 29 deadline.
Critical blocker: Geth/Nethermind fork on state gas reservoir overflow treatment. Needs resolution before bal-devnet-4 launch (target April 29). EIP-8037 breakout scheduled but status unclear.

suggestions.topic: epbs-devnet-2 planning and beacon state changes
suggestions.rationale: epbs-devnet-1 broken since launch. Devnet-2 blocked on beacon state changes. Need to unblock ePBS testing path and clarify timeline for external builder API testing before Glamsterdam merge.

Potuz to write up proposal for CL-only range sync without payload validation. EL teams need to review security implications async. Significant architectural change affecting sync performance and security model.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-4 scope finalization and launch timeline
suggestions.rationale: Spec created with EIP-7976, EIP-7981 confirmed. Points 3-6 in design doc still need discussion. Launch target April 29 (before interop) requires locking scope soon.
Original target April 15 (fallback April 22) has passed. Requires stable bal-devnet-3 + working epbs-devnet with external builder API tested. Need revised timeline given current blockers.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8136 partial cells inclusion in Glamsterdam
suggestions.rationale: Proposed in ACDT #76 for Glamsterdam with 300K validator testnet planned. Prysm/Lighthouse trunk-ready by end of April. May need formal inclusion decision.

suggestions.topic: Beacon API reviews: proposal preference SSE and envelope creation
suggestions.rationale: Two beacon-APIs PRs (#593, #584) assigned for CL team review in ACDT #76. No status updates in ACDT #77. Required for external builder implementation.
